summary: Retested Reader PDF button fix. Both FREE (Crown icon + 'PDF export is an Ultimate perk.' toast with Upgrade action, no download) and ULTIMATE (FileDown icon + jsPDF download of Test_Comic.pdf + 'PDF downloaded!' toast + stays on /comic/:id) flows verified working. Button at Reader.jsx L148-156 is correctly wired to downloadPDF(). Frontend-only retest as instructed; no backend changes.
critical_code_review_comments: Reader.jsx jsPDF is bundled into main chunk — consider dynamic import() since feature is Ultimate-only, to reduce initial bundle size.

Consider disabling the button's pointer-events or adding aria-disabled during exportingPdf (currently uses disabled attribute which is fine but no visible spinner affordance besides 'Exporting…' text).

success_rate.backend: 100% (30/30 from iteration_3, not rerun this iter)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (reader-pdf flow — both FREE gating + ULT download verified)

test_credentials: FREE: test_session_1776681630005 (test-user-1776681630005, tier=free, owns comic_test_test-use). ULT: test_session_ult_1776681630019 (test-user-ult-1776681630019, tier=ultimate, owns comic_test_test-use). Use localStorage.setItem('session_token', <token>) before navigating.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Reused comics from iteration_3.

ULT user → FileDown icon + jsPDF download Test_Comic.pdf + 'PDF downloaded!' success toast + stays on /comic/:id with no console errors. All previously seeded users and comics still intact in mongo.
